rulings.Case Title: HARRIET SCHATZ ET AL VS. 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 3, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Hearing Required. By no later than 8:30 a.m. on January 3, 2017 Plaintiff shall file and serve a supplemental brief with a chart of (A) subsequently enacted provisions (4th A/C paragraph 44) (B) the date of enactment, (C) explanation of its applicability to the conversion at issue in this action, and (D) evidence of Defendant's failure to comply with each provision. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. ANDRES SUAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Premature And Unlawful Trial Setting
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 3, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT ANN LEMBERG Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Premature And Unlawful Trial Setting OFF CALENDAR. Action settled. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft'S Responses Without Objection To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories-Set One, Special Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production Of Documents, Set One And Deem Admissions And Req. For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 3, 2017, line 3. PLAINTIFF AMY LEVINS Notice of motion To Compel Defendant's Responses Without Objection To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories-Set One, Special Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production Of Documents, Set One And Deem Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions DENIED, as to Requests for Admissions, Special Interrogatories and From Interrogatories. Motion is GRANTED as to Requests for Production. Defendant to provide within 5 days complete responses indicating which produced documents are responsive to which request. Sanctions granted in the amount of $400. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 3, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT MARIA CASTELLON, SANDRA TORRES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with 5-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a cause of action under CCP 1159, 1160, or 1161, etc. =(501/NJL)

rulings.Case Title: BROADWELL, LLC VS. HUANG YING SHAO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 3, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT HUANG YING SHAO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. This action is filed as a commercial Unlawful Detainer. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that Plaintiff is required to state compliance with or exemption from SFRO for commercial unlawful detainer actions. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: BROADWELL, LLC VS. HUANG YING SHAO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 3, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT HUANG YING SHAO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that calculation of daily damages methodology must be alleged that Defendant's proposed mythology is proper; or that the fair market rental value is limited to contractual rent. Mr. Raifsnider is ordered to file a proper substitution of attorney no later than 9:00 a.m. on January 3, 2017 and provide a courtesy to the Court no later than 9:15 a.m. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
